name: pathwise-correction
paperTitle: Pathwise Test-Time Correction for Autoregressive Long Video Generation
content:
## Introduction

After generating video, use gradient-based optimization to correct errors by backpropagating through generation process. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

After generating video, use gradient-based optimization to correct errors by backpropagating through generation process.

```
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]

  │
  └─→ Output
```
